name: Dennis v. United States
question: 1. Does the indictment charge a conspiracy to defraud the United States Government consistent with 18 U.S.C. 371? 2. Is section 9(h) of the Taft- Hartley Act a bill of attainder in violation of Article I, Section 9, Clause 3 of the U.S. Constitution? 3. Did the trial court err in denying the defense's request for access to grand jury testimony of prosecution witnesses or in camera inspection of the testimony?
description: A case in which the Court held that the arrest of members of the Communist Party of America for violation of the Smith Act did not infringe upon the member's First Amendment rights.
